name: Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect File Transfer
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Ali Alwashali
SIGMA Title: Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect File Transfer
SIGMA Description: Detects file being transferred via ScreenConnect RMM

False positives:
- Legitimate use of ScreenConnect

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%screenconnect%' AND "Event ID"=201 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%transferred files with action%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect File Transfer on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%screenconnect%' AND "Event ID"=201 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%transferred files with action%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect File Transfer
